feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Capacity Usage field configuration in SAP S4HANA Public Cloud for Warehouse Task creation
entry.content:
Hi Team,

I am working on SAP S4HANA Public Cloud and stuck on an issue where in Material Master's UOM screen has a field called Capacity Usage which has only 3 decimal places (Updated using calculation via API). Our calculation has values such as 0.000785 which post rounding off becomes 0.008 in this field. Now when we try to create a warehouse task in SAP EWM, this Capacity usage field is used and based on this field total Quantity is splitted into different Storage Bins. Because the value is rounded off, Bin splitting scenario is not working properly as we need at least 5 decimal places. Is there a way we can achieve this by creating out own custom field and assign that field to some configuration or any other solution if available.

Thanks & Regards,

Aman Mittal

entry.title: How to change digit behind the comma from three to two?
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

Customer have requirement to change the digit behind the comma from 3 to 2 for quantity and currency. We already tried to change it on personal settings but the digit behind the comma still 3.

Is there any solution ?

Thankyou!

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

entry.title: Purchase Contract with item category item unknown
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

Customer have requirement to create Purchase Contract with Quantity Contract. The issue is they cannot define the item on Purchase Contract, they know the item when they create the purchase order for the purchase contract.

We have found some articles that we can use Item Categories Item Unknown (M) on Purchase Contract that we can just define the material group. We already configure it but the item categories still not available.

We already tried to use Item Categories Material Group (W), but they only supported for Value Contract.

Is there any solution how to make Item Categories Item Unknown (M) available to use ? or other solution for the issue?

 

Thankyou!

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

entry.title: How to add new column on view setting on app
entry.content:
Dear Expert,

Can we add new column that not available on view settings app? For example we want to add new column "Delivered Qty" on app Manage Purchase Order.

Thankyou!

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

entry.title: How to set default filter when we choose GL Account
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

Can we set default filter when we choose G/L Account? For example, if we create the purchase order with account assignment category Cost Center, we have to input the G/L Account. When customer click the G/L account, they want automatically only showing G/L Account that start with 6 or expense account.

We already tried to use filter "6*", but we can not save the filter so every time customer open the G/L Account in purchase order they always have to type "6*".

Is there any solution?

Thankyou!

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

entry.title: Import Goods Movement Goods Issue from excel
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

Can we import Post Goods Movement -> Goods Issue (Other) from excel to SAP?

Because customer have requirement to use it because of number of data that have to be input.

Thankyou!

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

entry.title: Link with Rebate and Sales Order (scope item 1B6)
entry.content:
Hi all,
We are working with Rebate Condition on Sales Order (scope item 1B6). We noticed that when the rebate is posted, it doesn't show any link to the sales order. Is it possible to have these linked? That we can see for which sales order the rebate has been booked?

Thank you!

entry.title: No active outbound service for appl. obj. 500000002620230001, outp. type MMIM_MATDOC_GDSMVMT_ESOA, B
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

We face some error message "No active outbound service for appl. obj. 500000002620230001, outp. type MMIM_MATDOC_GDSMVMT_ESOA, BuPa ." when we want to see the PDF of goods issue for cost center. We already setup the output determination but still face the error.

Any solution ?

Thankyou!

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

entry.title: S/4 Hana Cloud Public - Configuring "Value Date Rules for Bank Transactions"
entry.content:
Could someone tell me where to make the configuration via CBC in public cloud to define  "Value Date Rules for Bank Transactions"  ?  The old OBBA  ?

I could not find this line of this configuration 

attached a print of OBBA

entry.title: The automatic creation of the asset master data during goods receipt is still possible
entry.content:
Hi Everyone, I'm looking for the functionality to create fixed assets in the Manage Purcharse Orders app (or advanced) and the regular option to set up the asset class and accounting data inside the PO to perform the asset number asignment process after the PO creation, during the post goods receipt.

is it possible with Public Edition?

entry.title: What are the steps to follow S/4HANA CLOUD PUBLIC to create a new ODATA with post method for TRM?
entry.content: What are the steps to follow in S/4HANA CLOUD PUBLIC to create a new ODATA with post method (for the creation of financial operations in TRM of money market) to create a Product Type 54A / 55a), and also that it is possible generate update?

entry.title: API or CDS for Manage Posting Periods
entry.content:
We are going to post journal entries from an external system to S/4HANA Cloud public edition.
I would like to check whether the posting date specified in the external system is within the open range set in Manage Posting Periods app.
However, I cannot find a standard API or CDS view to export information about open periods set in SAP.
Please let me know if there is anything relevant.

entry.title: Tutorial with JavaScript to Customize Correspondence Format SAP06
entry.content:
Can anyone share a tutorial with the practical steps to follow in S/4HANA CLOUD PUBLIC to customize a SAP06 correspondence (Account Statement) with all the necessary business logic? We have a client from Peru and Chile who requires it. We already know how to work with branding, but we are missing examples to add code with JavaScript within Adobe. 

Fiori ID F0744A

Kind regards

entry.title: CDS output to 3rd party
entry.content:
I used the standard CDS as underlying  CDS . we want the output of it to be send as e-mail to 3rd party


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: FLEET MANAGEMENT IN PUBLIC CLOUD FOR ASSET MANAGEMENT
entry.content:
Hello Team,

Does anyone know , how can we deal with fleet management (vehicle business) SAP S/4HANA Cloud for Asset Management, public edition to cover capabilities relevant for fleet management (fuel consumption, Daily KMR , HMR Report,  specific master data, etc.)

 

is there any chance to upcoming year,  adding this functionality in public cloud,

SAP Asset Strategy and Performance Management PLM Enterprise Asset Management (EAM)/Plant Maintenance (PM) SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

entry.title: No Authhorization to to perform a Write task in SAP S/4HANA Cloud.
entry.content:
How to Define Authorizations Based on Restrictions in SAP S/4HANA Cloud.

entry.title: Public Cloud: fiscalization in Croatia: how to link a charging device to a user
entry.content: In Croatia's fiscalization solution, the fiscal number range is determined by a charging device. The charging device is pulled from the user parameter /CCEE/FISC_CD. At least, this is how it works in an S4H on-premise. There is no possibility to set this user parameter in S4H Public Cloud. How can the charging device be predefined in S4H Public Cloud?

entry.title: We are located in Ecuador, what region should we enter to activate free BTP
entry.content: We are located in Ecuador, what region should we enter to activate free BTP

entry.title: Alert notification in SAP S4/HANA public cloud and SAP BTP
entry.content:
Dear community,

I have access to SAP S4/HANA public cloud and SAP BTP, and hope I can find a solution to my problems in one of these platforms.

I have just added safety stock in masterdata, and would like to create notifications for each material when it reaches the safety stock level threshold. I would also like to add seperate notifications for when, based on future orders, it looks like the safety stock will be eaten into in x days. 

I would preferably like to create a webhook from the notification, so I have explored "SAP Alert Notification service for SAP BTP", but I feel I don't have enough insight to say if this is a good solution? I am open to other solutions, and it would be nice if I was able to see when the problem occured, what the problem is, where I can fix it etc. in the alert.

I have also explored Situation Handling, both the standard and extended framework, but the same feeling of not enough insight occurs. Both SAP BTP and Situation Handling seem interesting, but I do not know where to start.

I would love some help in trying to figure this out, and I am open to other suggestions, and hope someone has some great experiences with managing alerts and notifications regarding stock levels.

entry.title: Up to 5 Decimal Places for quantities in general journal
entry.content:
Hi all,

I am looking for a way to increase the decimal places to 5 (digits after the comma) when entering a general journal entry.

In CBC there is this configuration activity 'Checks Units of Measurement' where you have the possibility to create your own unit of measure (changing an existing one doesn't seem possible). 

I created an additional Unit of Measure with following settings:

However, if I want to use this in the general journal entry app, I can only add up to 3 decimal places, but it shows 5 decimal places:

Can anyone help me on how to be able to enter 5 decimal places for quantity in a general journal entry?

Thank you!
